hero_landing.platforms: Facebook · Instagram · LinkedIn · X · Discord · WordPress Blog

preview_landing.image_alt: Nex-Nex — The Next Era of Content

workflow_section.title: How it works
workflow_section.subtitle: From idea to publishing across all networks — in just a few minutes.

01.title: AI learns your business
01.description: You upload your brand documents — style guide, products, communication tone. Your personal AI learns everything and becomes the expert of your brand.

02.title: You ask for post ideas
02.description: You tell Nex-Nex what you want to post about. Instantly, you get 5 creative ideas adapted to your brand and audience.

03.title: You choose the idea
03.description: You select the idea that fits you best. Nex-Nex develops it in the direction you choose.

04.title: AI writes the text, SEO, and hashtags
04.description: You receive the full text, SEO-optimized, with the right hashtags for each platform. Edit it if you want, or publish it directly.

05.title: You upload a photo or ask for an AI one
05.description: Do you have a photo? Upload it. Don't have one? Describe what you want and AI generates a professional prompt for the perfect image.

06.title: AI generates the image
06.description: From your prompt, AI creates professional images. You choose your preferred version directly from the app.

07.title: You post now or schedule it
07.description: Publish immediately or choose the best moment. Nex-Nex shows you when your audience is most active.

08.title: Best timing per network
08.description: Each platform has its golden hours. Nex-Nex automatically calculates when to post on Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, and more for maximum reach.

09.title: You publish on all networks
09.description: One single click — the post goes live simultaneously on all your platforms: Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, X, TikTok, Discord.

10.title: In any language
10.description: Is your audience global? Nex-Nex translates and culturally adapts your post into 50+ languages while preserving your brand voice.

bentogrid_section.title: Everything you need, in one place
bentogrid_section.subtitle: Nex-Nex replaces 4 separate tools with one single app, in a seamless experience.

brand_intelligence.title: Brand Intelligence
brand_intelligence.description: You upload your brand documents once. AI remembers your tone, products, and values — and writes like you every time.

from_idea_to_published.title: From idea to published in 3 minutes
from_idea_to_published.description: Idea → text → image → publishing on 6 platforms. The entire flow in a single app, without copy-paste between tools.

languages.title: 50+ languages
languages.description: Generate and publish in any language. AI culturally adapts the message — it doesn't just translate word by word.

best_time.title: Automatic best timing
best_time.description: The algorithm calculates maximum reach hours per platform and schedules automatically. You no longer need to check stats yourself.

features_section.label: Features
features_section.title: Everything Nex-Nex does for you.
features_section.subtitle: From content generation to automatic publishing — all the tools in a single app.

telegram_bot.title: Telegram Bot
telegram_bot.description: Send an idea from your phone. AI generates the post, you approve with a tap. Immediate or scheduled publishing.

brand_intelligence.title: Brand Intelligence (RAG)
brand_intelligence.description: Upload PDF, DOCX or URL with your brand description. AI writes as if it has known your company for years.

editorial_calendar.title: Editorial Calendar
editorial_calendar.description: Monthly and weekly view. Drag & drop to reschedule. Colors per platform and status.

idea_generator.title: Idea Generator
idea_generator.description: 100 post ideas generated from your brand context. Educational, promotional, storytelling — organized by category.

agency_mode.title: Agency Mode
agency_mode.description: Manage all clients from one account. Fast switch between workspaces, unified billing.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Reach, impressions, likes and shares synced automatically from all platforms. Top 5 posts per period.

testimonials_section.label: Testimonials
testimonials_section.title: What our customers would say — if we already had customers 😄
testimonials_section.subtitle: Hypothetical testimonials generated by AI. The real ones will appear soon.

items.name: Andrei Popescu
items.review: I went from 3 hours/week on social media to 15 minutes. Nex-Nex generates exactly our brand tone — I no longer correct AI texts.

items.name: Maria Ionescu
items.review: I manage 8 clients with Nex-Nex Agency. Visual calendar, quick approval, automatic publishing. It eliminated half of my manual work.

items.name: Radu Constantin
items.review: The Telegram bot is brilliant. I take a photo of a new product, AI writes the caption, I approve, done. The whole process takes 2 minutes.

items.name: Elena Dumitrescu
items.review: RAG makes the difference compared to any other tool. AI knows exactly the prices, features and values of my brand. Zero posts with wrong information.

items.name: Mihai Stanescu
items.review: Our team of 5 now publishes 3x more content. The approval workflow with Nex-Nex is much faster than any tool we have tested.

items.name: Ana Popa
items.review: As a freelancer with 12 clients, Nex-Nex Agency saved my business. One subscription, all clients under control, simple billing.

items.name: Bogdan Muresan
items.review: I tried Buffer, Hootsuite, SocialBee. Nex-Nex is the only one with Telegram bot + RAG per client. For agencies, it is a game changer.

items.name: Ioana Constantin
items.review: I knew nothing about social media. Now I post daily on Instagram and Facebook without losing time. Nex-Nex does everything — I just approve.

metadata.title: Pricing — Nex-Nex
metadata.description: Simple plans for individual creators and agencies. 14-day free trial, no card required.

marketing_pricing_page.title: Simple and transparent pricing
marketing_pricing_page.subtitle: 14-day free trial on any plan. Card required at signup, no charge until trial ends. Cancel anytime.

topup.title: Need more?
topup.subtitle: Buy extra AI credits anytime, or add more brands to any paid plan — no need to upgrade tiers.
topup.credits_title: Extra AI credits (one-time, valid until end of month)
topup.brand_line: €10/month per additional brand — available on any paid plan, not just Agency

pricing_cards.label: Pricing
pricing_cards.title: Start at full speed!
pricing_cards.support_note: You can test the subscriptions and won't be charged.

pricing_faq.label: FAQ
pricing_faq.title: Frequently asked questions
pricing_faq.subtitle: If you can't find the answer, write to us at support@nex-nex.com.

item_1.question: Is there a free trial?
item_1.answer: Yes — a 14-day free trial on any paid plan. A card is required at signup (charged only after the trial ends) so you can explore all features before committing.

item_2.question: Can I cancel anytime?
item_2.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime from the dashboard, with no penalties. After cancellation, you stay on the paid plan until the end of the billed period.

item_3.question: What does RAG per brand mean?
item_3.answer: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) means the AI reads the documents you upload — product descriptions, prices, FAQ — and generates content based on real information, not invented details. Each brand has its own isolated set of documents.

item_4.question: Which social platforms are supported?
item_4.answer: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Discord, and WordPress Blog — via direct API. YouTube, Threads, and Bluesky are coming in Phase 2. TikTok and Pinterest are in the backlog and require external review that can take months.

item_5.question: How does the Telegram Bot work?
item_5.answer: You connect your Nex-Nex account with Telegram from Settings. Then you write any topic in chat — the AI generates the post using your brand's RAG, you approve it with one button, and it is published or scheduled automatically. It works from any phone.

item_6.question: Is there a discount for annual billing?
item_6.answer: Yes — about a 17% discount (equivalent to 2 free months) on the annual subscription compared to the monthly one.

item_7.question: Does the Agency plan cover all my clients?
item_7.answer: Yes — the Agency plan (€199/month) includes 20 brands. Additional brands are €10/month each, with no hard cap. Each client has an isolated workspace, separate login, and separate RAG.
